message:
ci: add wasm-host feature testing on Linux

Add dedicated CI steps for wasm-host feature validation:
- cargo clippy --features wasm-host (lint WASM extension host code)
- cargo test --features wasm-host (run WASM-related tests)

Both steps are Linux-only since WASM host support currently targets
Linux deployments. This ensures the optional wasm-host feature compiles
and passes tests without being included in the default feature set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -121,12 +121,20 @@ jobs:
       - name: cargo clippy
         run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
 
+      - name: cargo clippy (wasm-host) [linux]
+        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
+        run: cargo clippy --all-targets --features wasm-host -- -D warnings
+
       - name: cargo doc
         run: cargo doc --no-deps
 
       - name: cargo test
         run: cargo test --all-targets
 
+      - name: cargo test (wasm-host) [linux]
+        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
+        run: cargo test --all-targets --features wasm-host
+
       - name: Coverage summary (llvm-cov)
         if: runner.os == 'Linux'
         run: |
